task_completion.description: The 'Lab Safety Certified' badge is created with the correct name, description, and image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Add a new badge' form filled out with the name 'Lab Safety Certified', the specified description, and the uploaded green image (safety_badge.png), or the badge details page showing these elements.

task_completion.description: The criteria for the 'Lab Safety Certified' badge is set to 'Manual issue by role' for the Teacher role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the criteria selection page for the Lab Safety badge with 'Manual issue by role' selected and the 'Teacher' role checked, or the criteria overview page displaying this requirement.

task_completion.description: The 'Lab Safety Certified' badge is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Enable access' button being clicked, a confirmation message that the badge is available to users, or the badge status indicating it is enabled/active.

task_completion.description: The 'Biology Course Complete' badge is created with the correct name, description, and image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Add a new badge' form filled out with the name 'Biology Course Complete', the specified description, and the uploaded blue image (completion_badge.png), or the badge details page showing these elements.

task_completion.description: The criteria for the 'Biology Course Complete' badge is set to 'Course completion'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the criteria selection page for the Course Complete badge with 'Course completion' selected, or the criteria overview page displaying this requirement.

task_completion.description: The 'Biology Course Complete' badge is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Enable access' button being clicked, a confirmation message that the badge is available to users, or the badge status indicating it is enabled/active.

task_completion.description: Both badges are successfully listed in the course badges management page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the 'Manage badges' page in the BIO101 course showing both the 'Lab Safety Certified' and 'Biology Course Complete' badges in the list.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to navigate Moodle and create the badges.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface being used to interact with Moodle, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the actual image files from the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the file picker or drag-and-drop interface being used to upload 'safety_badge.png' and 'completion_badge.png' from '/home/ga/badge_images/'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the badge creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open or used to alter the page content to falsely show success messages or badge listings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task creates two course-level badges in the 'BIO101' course. Badge 1: 'Lab Safety Certified', uses a programmatically generated green PNG image ('safety_badge.png'), criteria is 'Manual issue by role' (Teacher). Badge 2: 'Biology Course Complete', uses a programmatically generated blue PNG image ('completion_badge.png'), criteria is 'Course completion'. Both badges must be enabled (status available to users).
